title: Find & Till
intro: Move precisely along a line: `f{char}` jumps onto the next occurrence of a character, `F{char}` searches backward. `t{char}` stops just before it. Repeat the last find with `;` (same direction) or `,` (reverse).

hints: `f` waits for a character, then jumps onto its next occurrence.

exercises.instruction: Jump to the third `.` in the chain: `f.` finds the first, then `;` repeats it to reach the third.
hints: `;` repeats the last `f` in the same direction — press it twice after `f.`

exercises.instruction: Land just before the `;` using `t;` (till, not onto).
hints: `t` stops one character before the target — `f` lands on it.

exercises.instruction: The cursor is at the end. Search backward onto the `=` with `F=`.
hints: `F` (Shift+f) is `f` in reverse — it searches toward the start of the line.
